name: Samsara Dragon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>輪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>廻</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ね</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>サンサーラ
desc: This card can be treated as 2 Tributes for the Tribute Summon of a Dragon monster. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Level 5 or higher Dragon monster in your GY; add it to your hand, then, immediately after this effect resolves, you can Tribute Summon that monster. You can only use this effect of "Samsara Dragon" once per turn.
mnst_eff: This card can be treated as 2 Tributes for the Tribute Summon of a Dragon monster. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Level 5 or higher Dragon monster in your GY; add it to your hand, then, immediately after this effect resolves, you can Tribute Summon that monster. You can only use this effect of "Samsara Dragon" once per turn.

sets.set: Ghosts From the Past: The 2nd Haunting

banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
